plan.name: Busy Bodybuilding 6-Week
plan.author: Universal Fit
plan.description: A classical upper/lower bodybuilding plan for busy lifters: short warmups, dense hypertrophy work, smart supersets, brief conditioning, and a clear deload.

mesocycles.name: Base Density
mesocycles.goal: Build repeatable volume with short rests and clean reps.

mesocycles.name: Build and Intensify
mesocycles.goal: Push the main lifts heavier while keeping accessories dense.

mesocycles.name: Deload
mesocycles.goal: Reduce fatigue, keep movement quality, and leave fresh.

weeks.name: Base Density 1
weeks.notes: Stay crisp. Most work should finish with 2-3 reps in reserve.

days.name: Upper Strength Density
days.notes: Bench is the priority. Supersets keep the session tight without rushing the main lift.

items.notes: Control the lowering. Stop before grindy reps.
Alternate push and pull with controlled form.

weeks.name: Base Density 2
weeks.notes: Add a small amount of load or one rep while keeping rests honest.

weeks.name: Build and Intensify 1
weeks.notes: Main lifts move heavier. Accessories still use density, not sloppy speed.

weeks.name: Build and Intensify 2
weeks.notes: Keep main-lift loads steady and beat week 3 through cleaner execution.

weeks.name: Build and Intensify 3
weeks.notes: Peak week. Hit strong top sets, then use short back-off work for volume.

items.notes: Use the same station. Reduce load once and keep moving.

weeks.name: Deload and Resensitize
weeks.notes: Reduce load and volume. Finish every session feeling better than when you started.
